title: Khara Official Web Radio
wikitext:
[]: Khara Official Web Radio             Quote Post by GhostlyOcam » Mon Jun 07, 2021 10:43 pm Khara dropped a nearly an hour long of official web radio program today, recorded in May 22 as the description says. Seems like they're telling the details of "Shin Eva Last Run" campaign but does anyone interested in translating or at least summarizing the gist of it? It's only up for limited time until June 18. https://youtu.be/EGLGGMsGr-s

[]: Re: Khara Official Web Radio             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Tue Jun 08, 2021 4:39 am They actually dropped two. You linked the Side A; here's the Side B. The videos are titled, "This is out of the blue, but we're going to explain all the things happening from 06/12 (and talk about other stuff)."

[]: Re: Khara Official Web Radio             Quote Post by GhostlyOcam » Tue Jun 08, 2021 5:05 am Oh, I thought the B-part would come out later, didn't knew they released it simultaneously.

[]: Re: Khara Official Web Radio             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Wed Jun 09, 2021 6:45 pm I have to wonder if "last run" referred to 3.0+1.0 strictly, and not 3.0+1.01, nor 3.0+1.11, 3.03+1.111, or 3.333+1.111.

[]: Re: Khara Official Web Radio             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Wed Jun 09, 2021 7:39 pm I don't think so. The "last run" is the cut of the movie that's being dubbed as 3.0+1.01, so I don't think they would do later runs of slightly updated cuts and say "we were just kidding about that whole 'last run' thing".

[]: Re: Khara Official Web Radio             Quote Post by Zethus Thorne » Wed Jun 09, 2021 8:39 pm Last Run in Theaters
